description: DevOps showcase pack: an SRE running the nimbus-api service across three months — March pool-exhaustion outage with PgBouncer mitigation, secrets/backup/DB-failover runbooks, observability stack decision (Datadog over Grafana Cloud), a noisy-alerts post-mortem that rewrote alert thresholds, a TLS rotation incident that split staging/prod issuers, deploy-window and phased-migration policies, and a canary deploy framework that cut rollback time from 6m to 30s. Demonstrates runbook recall, decision provenance, recurring-incident detection, and operational policy persistence.
